title: 0.7fl oz Glue Bottle Snifter Needle Tip Dispenser
description:
Glue bottle features an 18 gauge needle tip dispenser for precision applications. This bottle is perfect for applying precise amounts of glue, glaze, paints, testing solutions, or other liquids. Each bottle will hold up to .7 fluid ounces (20mL) of liquid and is just 5.74” tall, making it a nice compact size for easy transport and storage when not in use. The bottle is made of durable, transparent and flexible plastic that easily squeezes without too much pressure so you can use it many times without your hand cramping. The needle comes with a sturdy snap-tight lid to protect it and your hands when not in use. You can also easily add a brush tip to the bottle if needed for a specific project or craft.
